title: sabina standleyi
intro: Sabina standleyi, also known as Silver Sage or Sacred Sage, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and saponins. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Sabina standleyi can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used in herbal preparations, including salves and ointments, to promote wound healing and skin health.
